'''''Manta''''' was a [[C-3 passenger liner]] located at an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scrap yard at [[Tolig IV]]. It had [[Dejarik/Legends|Dejarik]] boards as its cargo. It was present there when [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Emon Azzameen]] went there to investigate the various containers to search for the data core, and when the raid took place.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
